com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service

Interface BluetoothService.BluetoothDeviceConnectionCallback

  • Enclosing class:
    BluetoothService

    public static interface BluetoothService.BluetoothDeviceConnectionCallback

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void onDeviceConnectedSuccessfully()
      Will be called when a BT connection will be successfully established.
      void onError(BluetoothService.BluetoothDeviceConnectionError error)
      Will be called in the following cases: 1.
      void onFailedToFindDevice()
      Will be called when phone/tablet can't find the device.

    • Method Detail

      • onDeviceConnectedSuccessfully

        void onDeviceConnectedSuccessfully()
        Will be called when a BT connection will be successfully established.

      • onError

        void onError(BluetoothService.BluetoothDeviceConnectionError error)
        Will be called in the following cases: 1. BLE is not supported by current phone/tablet; 2. BLE is turned off; 3. location service permission is denied; 4. location service is turned off.

      • onFailedToFindDevice

        void onFailedToFindDevice()
        Will be called when phone/tablet can't find the device.
